value.found_quote: **Nano Banana 2**: Used by the generative image tool when the Agent wants to produce a UI mockup, needs images to populate a web page or application, generate system or architecture diagrams, or other generative image tasks.
value.rationale: The page explicitly confirms that Antigravity includes a generative image tool powered by Nano Banana 2, and that this tool is used by the Agent to produce UI mockups and web previews (images to populate a web page or application), directly substantiating the claim.
